positive: A symmetrical, highly intricate, neo-vintage illustration featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and stylized mythical vines. The composition is centrally focused, designed for apparel print. Elements include glowing abstract crescent moons, swirling nebulae rendered in deep indigo and teal, and intricate floral mandalas with glowing accents of gold and emerald. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and cosmic science fiction, utilizing clean silhouettes, crisp line work, and dramatic radial symmetry. Emphasize strong contrast between the glowing subject matter and a rich, solid background. High detail, vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, noise, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, grayscale, photorealistic
